name: codex-hub
description: Codex CLI status-line helper plugin for context, short-window usage, weekly usage, and live status.

interface.shortDescription: Configure a compact Codex status line.
interface.longDescription: Configures Codex CLI's built-in TUI status-line items for context, rolling usage, weekly usage, model, directory, and run state without patching or rebuilding Codex.
defaultPrompt: Configure the Codex Hub status line
Explain the Codex Hub status fields
